descriptions.text: Armor Battle is a multidirectional shooter video game written by Chris Kingsley for the Intellivision  and published by Mattel in 1979. One of the earliest games available for the console, Armor Battle pits two players against each other in a contest to see which player can eliminate their opponent's stock of tanks first. The game was also later released on the Atari 2600 in 1982 under the name Armor Ambush.
